name: Azimut 77 Yacht
description: Luxurious 77-foot motor yacht with state-of-the-art amenities, spacious master suite, and capacity for 8 guests plus crew. Features advanced navigation systems, entertainment areas, and outdoor decks with panoramic views.

name: Gulfstream G650ER
description: Redefine business travel with this state-of-the-art executive jet, offering a sophisticated workspace, luxurious seating, and unparalleled connectivity. Seamlessly connect continents and conduct your affairs in privacy and style, maximizing your valuable time.

name: Modern Mansion Los-Angeles
description: This sleek Los Angeles villa features floor-to-ceiling glass and an infinity pool with breathtaking skyline views. It is a stunning masterpiece of modern architecture and California luxury.

name: Bahamas Island
description: This pristine tropical sanctuary offers unparalleled seclusion amidst turquoise waters and swaying palms. The ultra-modern estate features a private helipad and world-class amenities for the ultimate luxury escape.

name: Sunseeker 90 Ocean Yacht
description: Embrace refined elegance on this classic mega-yacht, where timeless design meets contemporary luxury, offering spacious guest quarters and a serene ambiance. Enjoy meticulously crafted interiors and impeccable service, ensuring every moment is one of pure indulgence.

name: Bombardier Global 7500
description: Is the world's largest and longest-range business jet, capable of connecting cities as distant as New York and Hong Kong without a fuel stop. Its spacious cabin offers four distinct living areas, including a master suite with a full-size bed, providing an unmatched level of luxury and comfort for global travelers.

name: Beverly Hills Mega Mansion
description: An architectural masterpiece, this contemporary residence boasts sleek lines and expansive glass walls, seamlessly integrating breathtaking panoramic views into every living space. It features state-of-the-art smart home technology, a gourmet chef's kitchen, and a luxurious spa, defining modern opulent living.

name: Wavi Island
description: Discover an untouched gem where verdant rainforest meets dramatic ocean vistas, providing a canvas for your dream estate. This private island offers a harmonious blend of natural beauty and absolute seclusion, ideal for those seeking tranquility and a connection to nature.

name: Bering B165 Yacht
description: Glide across turquoise waters in unparalleled style aboard this majestic superyacht, featuring opulent suites and a world-class entertainment deck. Experience ultimate privacy and personalized service, transforming every voyage into an unforgettable escape.

name: Boeing BBJ 777X
description: The plane represents the pinnacle of long-range private aviation, capable of connecting any two cities on Earth non-stop in unparalleled luxury. Its massive, fully customizable cabin provides a sophisticated sanctuary in the sky, blending cutting-edge technology with the world’s most spacious twin-engine interior.

name: Golden Mansion Miami
description: Is a breathtaking testament to architectural opulence, boasting sun-kissed facades and lavish interiors adorned with exquisite gold detailing. This ultra-luxury waterfront estate offers a seamless blend of world-class amenities and stunning coastal views, providing an unparalleled sanctuary for elite living.

name: Island Maldives
description: This breathtaking private island offers an exclusive sanctuary surrounded by pristine white sands and vibrant turquoise lagoons. Boasting world-class snorkeling reefs and immense development potential, this rare tropical gem represents the ultimate investment for those seeking unparalleled luxury and seclusion.
